form.formComment: Drawn the inside. At the last outing finished last over 365m at Nowra beaten 13 lengths (21.67) behind Where's Derek in a Grade 4/5 on April 13. Can bounce back. One of the main chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Drawn the inside. At the last outing finished last over 365m at Nowra beaten 13 lengths (21.67) behind Where's Derek in a Grade 4/5 on April 13. Can bounce back. One of the main chances.

form.formComment: Won two starts back won at this course over 320m. Couldn't reproduced the effort last start when he finished 3rd in a Grade 5 on April 12 over 320m at this track behind True Request beaten 0.8 lengths (18.55). Hard to tip with any confidence.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back won at this course over 320m. Couldn't reproduced the effort last start when he finished 3rd in a Grade 5 on April 12 over 320m at this track behind True Request beaten 0.8 lengths (18.55). Hard to tip with any confidence.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the first turn hampered and stumbled off the heels.

form.formComment: Hit the frame at this track last time when a 1.75 lengths third but did record a solid 18.18 over the 320m trip. Looks the one to beat with a repeat of that effort.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame at this track last time when a 1.75 lengths third but did record a solid 18.18 over the 320m trip. Looks the one to beat with a repeat of that effort.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Rounding the home turn hampered off heels then came together.

form.formComment: Comes off a (18.35) win last time, scoring by 0.8 lengths in a Grade 5 over 320m at this track. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and five places from 11 starts. Looks a place chance at best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Comes off a (18.35) win last time, scoring by 0.8 lengths in a Grade 5 over 320m at this track. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and five places from 11 starts. Looks a place chance at best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start crowded for room and hampered off the back.

form.formComment: Strong performance to score by 2.25 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at this track, recording a swift 18.21 over the 320m journey. In form and can measure up again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to score by 2.25 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at this track, recording a swift 18.21 over the 320m journey. In form and can measure up again.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 2.25 lengths at this track over 320m (18.20) beating Wicked Raven in Grade 5 on April 12. Prefer to watch at this stage.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid performance to win by 2.25 lengths at this track over 320m (18.20) beating Wicked Raven in Grade 5 on April 12. Prefer to watch at this stage.

form.formComment: Last appeared when sixth over 388m at Gosford four months ago. Has ability and can overcome the wide draw. Go close.
